no: Ophysia by Llewren. Chaotic good half-elven Skald companion from Daggerford. Recruitable in Nashkel (BG1) and Baldur's Gate city (SoD). Romance for female PCs.
sum: A chaotic good half-elven Skald companion from Daggerford, recruitable in Nashkel. Romance for female PCs.

co.n: Ophysia, a Skald companion for BG:EE and SoD
co.no: Adds Ophysia as a joinable Skald NPC. Found at the Belching Dragon Tavern in Nashkel. Includes friendship, romance (female PC), and banters.
co.tp2n: Ophysia, a Skald companion for BG:EE and SoD

co.n: Optional: Give Ophysia interjections throughout BG1 content
co.no: Adds Ophysia interjections to BG1 dialogue and events.
